ordinary_no_progress_guard.fingerprint: ordinary|{"suggestions":[{"title":"fix the broken user merge on the review branch","description":"today’s `review` merge left an open run blocker: `user.java` now has conflicting id annotations and `userservicetests` still build fields that no longer exist. there is no pr or ci already handling this, and your last codex thread was also about getting the project to run.","prompt":"on the `review` branch, reconcile the broken user merge so the spring app boots again. inspect `user.java`, `userrepository`, `usercontroller`, and `userservicetests`, fix the id/field mismatch cleanly, and tell me what changed.","appid":"76869538009648d5b282a4bb21c3d157"},{"title":"make the jwt security merge actually usable","description":"security was added on june 25, but `securityconfig` currently requires auth for every non-swagger route and the repo still has no login or signup endpoint. codex can add the minimum auth flow so you stop hitting 401s when testing the new user apis.","prompt":"implement the minimum auth flow this project is missing on `review`: add signup/login endpoints that issue jwts, wire those routes into `securityconfig`, and keep the existing protected endpoints intact. base it on the current `jwtprovider` and `jwtfilter` setup, then summarize the changes and any assumptions.","appid":"76869538009648d5b282a4bb21c3d157"}]}

ordinary|리뷰 crud 구현 완료했습니다. 새 기능은 `com.mjc.hotel.review` 패키지 아래에만 추가했고, `student` 패키지는 실제 구현에 연결하지 않았습니다. 추가된 핵심 진입점은 [reviewcontroller.java](/c:/develop/kdtgit/codingtest/mjc_b-hotel-reservation/hotel/src/main/java/com/mjc/hotel/review/controller/reviewcontroller.java:20)입니다. 구현된 api: - `post /reviews`: 리뷰 + 사진 + 태그 + 카테고리별 평점 생성 - `get /reviews`: 리뷰 목록 조회 - `get /reviews/{reviewid}`: 리뷰 단건 조회 - `put /reviews/{reviewid}`: 리뷰 + 하위 데이터 전체 수정 - `delete /reviews/{reviewid}`: 리뷰 + 하위 데이터 삭제 추가한 구조: - entity: `review`, `reviewphoto`, `reviewtag`, `reviewrating` - repository: 각 엔티티별 jpa repository - dto: 요청/응답 dto - service: [reviewservice.java](/c:/develop/kdtgit/codingtest/mjc_b-hotel-reservation/hotel/src/main/java/com/mjc/hotel/review/service/reviewservice.java:33) 검증 결과: - `.\gradlew.bat compilejava` 통과 - `.\gradlew.bat compiletestjava`는 기존 테스트인 `userservicetests.java`에서 `userbuilder.grade("bronze")`를 호출하지만 현재 `user`에 `grade` 필드가 없어 실패했습니다. 리뷰 코드 문제는 아닙니다. 그리고 요청하신 컨텍스트 문서도 한국어로 정리했고, 범위 확정 내용을 반영했습니다: [review-crud-20260629t003442z.md](/c:/develop/kdtgit/codingtest/mjc_b-hotel-reservation/.omx/context/review-crud-20260629t003442z.md)

ordinary|{"suggestions":[{"title":"fix the review branch user entity so the app boots again","description":"`review` was merged today, `user.java` is still dirty, and the current entity has a broken dual-`@id` mapping that will block jpa startup before your new review code can run. codex can repair it against the mariadb `users` schema in `help.md` and keep the in-progress review crud intact.","prompt":"inspect the current `review` branch after the jun 29 merge and fix `hotel/src/main/java/com/mjc/hotel/user/entity/user.java` so the spring app can start against the mariadb schema in `help.md`. preserve the new review crud files, resolve the entity mapping cleanly, and then verify whether any remaining startup blockers are still left.","appid":"76869538009648d5b282a4bb21c3d157"}]}
